name: INCARNAGE
short_description: The world’s bloodiest top-down bullet-hell shooter. Nilus, a lone soldier, lays waste to oppression with seething hatred, painting a brighter future in a visceral congealment of red.
detailed_description:
BLOOD. GUTS. INCARNAGE.

INCARNAGE is an arcade-style top-down bullet-hell shooter that increases your speed the more you kill enemies. Paint the streets with a variety of weapons and your dash that pummels soldiers into fountains of red.

You play as Nilus, one of the lead soldiers in the rebellion against Kro-Tech and it's tyrannous rule over Krome. Fight through their forces of soldiers, mechanisms, and horrifying experiments as you move through Krome's various locales and destroy the source of the madness.

ANNIHILATE AND DESTROY.

Blast through 35 Levels in a full solo-made campaign inspired by old 90s action movies & retro arcade games, featuring hand-drawn cutscenes and sprite graphics. Enemies have actively changing sprites depending on damage dealt and various ways they can be blown to bits. With various different enemy types with unique movesets, it's gonna take some serious focus to stay alive.
